message:
feat: Phase 1 concurrent tool dispatch (#14)

Implement concurrent execution across four areas:

1. Concurrent combinators (combinator.rs): Replace sequential Phase 0
   stubs with actual concurrent polling. join_all, race, quorum, and
   first_ok now round-robin poll all child futures each wakeup cycle,
   enabling true concurrent progress. All use safe Rust (no unsafe)
   via poll_fn + Pin<Box<dyn Future>>::as_mut().

2. Timeout enforcement (combinator.rs): race_timeout uses a wall-clock
   deadline (std::time::Instant) that fires RequestCancelled when
   exceeded. quorum_timeout checks the deadline each poll cycle and
   returns partial results (quorum_met=false) on expiry.

3. HTTP connection concurrency (lib.rs): run_http_accept_loop now
   spawns a std::thread per accepted connection instead of processing
   inline. An Arc<AtomicUsize> semaphore enforces max_connections from
   HttpServerConfig, rejecting excess connections with 503. Multiple
   tools/call requests on separate HTTP connections execute in parallel.

4. HttpServerConfig wiring (lib.rs, builder.rs): Add http_config field
   to Server struct and ServerBuilder, with builder setter. The accept
   loop reads mcp_path, health_path, and max_connections from config
   instead of hardcoding them.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
